candidates.why: Candidate is a top-line sales row, but it appears to be gross sales before excise taxes/adjustments rather than net revenue.
Not revenue; direct costs.
Operating expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Sales gains on property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Asset sale gain, not core revenue.

candidates.row_label: Sales losses and scrapping of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Loss row, not revenue.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the semantically correct revenue label. The statement shows 'Gross Sales' less 'Excise taxes and other adjustments' leading to populated 'Net sales', which is the correct top-line revenue measure. There are two 'Net sales' labels in the preview, one blank and one populated; exact row-label matching cannot distinguish between them, so manual review is needed. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net sales

candidates.why: Direct cost line immediately below net sales; standard COGS label.
Could be a cost component, but 'Cost of sales' is the clearer direct COGS line.
Balance sheet asset row, not income statement COGS.
Balance sheet asset row, not income statement COGS.

candidates.row_label: Advance payments and Unfinished purchases ,Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing row, not COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the standard direct cost line.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component covering selling/marketing overhead.
Clear SG&A component covering administrative overhead.
Can be an SG&A-type overhead bucket; excluded only if clearly non-overhead, which is not indicated here.
Potential SG&A/personnel overhead bucket, but preview is unpopulated and more specific populated overhead rows exist.
Broad overhead bucket, but more specific populated component rows exist, so prefer components over subtotal-style rows.

candidates.row_label: Share-based incentives, value of work performance
candidates.why: Share-based compensation can be part of SG&A overhead.
Potential personnel overhead bucket, but more specific populated components exist.
Dedicated R&D row exists, but it appears below operating result in supplemental/disclosure section, so do not include in XSGA to avoid mixing below-EBIT supplemental items.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

final_choice.row_label: Share-based incentives, value of work performance

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row is provided. Selected the best overhead components and excluded COGS, D&A, impairments, finance items, and totals/subtotals. Did not include 'Research & Development' because it appears below operating result in a supplemental section.

candidates.why: Explicit dedicated R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset/capitalized development, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. It appears below operating result, so it is mapped to XRD but not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; useful fallback if no cleaner interest-expense line is available for a given year.
Specific interest expense component, but only lease-related and therefore narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Finance Lease contracts
candidates.why: Specific interest label but appears unpopulated in preview; still potentially valid for some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Specific interest expense line and closest to core borrowing interest.
Finance expense component but not specifically interest.
Semantically ideal generic interest-expense label, though preview is unpopulated and may be supplemental.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest supplemental row; narrower fallback only.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Priority list ordered from most semantically direct interest-expense label to specific borrowing-interest components, then broad finance-cost fallback. Later code should take the first non-missing row by year.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests; use only if owner/parent equity line is unavailable.
Balancing row, not a substantive equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet equation, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line, which excludes non-controlling interests and avoids double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation row, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation row, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / NCI line.
Equivalent balance sheet wording for NCI; good fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels as priority list. BE uses parent-owner equity, so MIB is kept separate to avoid double counting.
